sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43699" key="eu)/doulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὔδουλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n43699.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">good to one's slaves</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0309.tlg001:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Achae.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:212" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">212</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
